title: The Unified Global Speaker Blueprint Template

fields.label: Chapter #
fields.placeholder: [Insert Number from Syllabus]

fields.label: Chapter Name
fields.placeholder: [Insert Name from Syllabus]

fields.label: Level
fields.placeholder: [Insert 1, 2, or 3]

fields.label: Focus
fields.placeholder: [Insert Negotiation / Networking / Both]

fields.label: The "Work-Ready" Objective
fields.placeholder: In 1 sentence: The specific workplace outcome achieved by the end of this session.

fields.label: Commercial Relevance Script
fields.placeholder: Provide a script detailing the real-world high stakes of the session's macro-scenario for the coach to read to set the stage.

fields.label: The Scenario Setup
fields.placeholder: Contextualize the corporate setting or high-stakes challenge.

fields.label: The Input Baseline (The Fallback)
fields.placeholder: Define the common, unassisted approach or generic "credentials-first" template the students must execute for their starting run.

fields.label: Rule 1
fields.placeholder: Linguistic or structural restructuring step 1

fields.label: Rule 2
fields.placeholder: Linguistic or structural restructuring step 2

fields.label: Coach Script (The Target Output)
fields.placeholder: Provide a fully produced, high-impact example text for the coach to read out loud to model the exact structural layout and timing.

phases.title: Deliberate Practice & Peer Feedback Loops
phases.guidance: The Global Speaker Bar Success Metrics — to pass, the student must flawlessly demonstrate all three tracking pillars simultaneously.

fields.label: The Core Drill
fields.placeholder: [Insert Drill Name from Syllabus]

fields.label: The Rotational Execution Guidelines
fields.placeholder: Explicit instructions on how students must apply the transformation rules to their individual roles.

success_metrics.label: Technical Accuracy
success_metrics.placeholder: Specific structural checklist item, e.g., flawless execution of the transformation rules.

success_metrics.label: Linguistic Fluency / Bimodal Alignment
success_metrics.placeholder: Specific medium-specific or behavioral marker required to pass.

success_metrics.label: Executive Presence
success_metrics.placeholder: Specific tracking metric for behavioral polish, e.g., zero filler words.

fields.label: Stress-Test 1 (Time Crunch)
fields.placeholder: Instruction on how to reduce the delivery window to force verbal compression.

fields.label: Stress-Test 2 (Adversarial)
fields.placeholder: Instruction on a specific live objection, participant distraction, or interruption to inject.

fields.label: The Gains Check-In Prompt
fields.placeholder: Provide an explicit reflection question the coach can use to prompt students to articulate their emotional and skill growth from baseline to target output.

fields.label: Key Phrase to Use
fields.placeholder: Professional alternative to common jargon.

fields.label: Common Pitfall to Ban
fields.placeholder: What behavioral/linguistic mistake to explicitly target.

fields.label: Takeaway 1 (Verbal)
fields.placeholder: Immediate structural or linguistic application.

fields.label: Takeaway 2 (Delivery)
fields.placeholder: Key physical or digital framing adjustment required to preserve authority.

fields.label: The Golden Rule
fields.placeholder: One-sentence foundational axiom defining the core operational philosophy of this chapter.
